title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Good morning everybody. Today feels like a holiday because it is my perfect day. So last night I did not set an alarm and I allowed myself to sleep in a little bit this morning. It felt so nice sleeping in. Since it's my perfect day, I'm going to show you some of my favorite things to do, some of my favorite things to eat and see, and just spend the day doing things that I really enjoy. Unfortunately, Mother Nature did not get the memo that it was my perfect day because on my perfect day, it would not rain, but it is so rainy outside right now. But that's okay, I'll make the best of it. To start the day off, I'm going to do yoga, which is my favorite exercise. I do it every morning and it's something I look forward to in the morning. Let's get moving. I'm on my yoga mat and I've got my laptop set up in front of me because I've been doing a 90 day yoga challenge on YouTube. I just finished my workout and now I'm going to do a few chores. My mind is so much more at ease and at peace when I have a clean house. So even though I hate doing chores, I will feel so much better afterwards. I worked out, the house is super clean, I showered and got ready, and I even snuck in a little bit of work. I had a peaceful but productive morning. But now I'm feeling a little bit antsy because I haven't gone outside once yet today and it's already noon. So I think I'm going to take myself out on a little breakfast or I guess at this point brunch date. The rain isn't actually too bad right now. It's just like a light drizzle but I'm on my way to the original pancake house. I'm a sucker for American style breakfast and it's such comfort food for me. I also love that the interior of the restaurant is kind of like a classic diner.

Brunch was fantastic and it definitely hit the spot. I was careful not to over-indulge too much so I've got leftovers. This will be perfect for breakfast tomorrow. On my perfect day usually I would go for a long walk outside but since the weather is kind of bad today and it's been raining on and off all day today I'm going to go to the mall. I don't usually love shopping but I know at this department store they recently got an American brand called Bath & Body Works which carries a lot of lotions and body washes but I love their candles especially their seasonal candles so they have a lot of false sense like apple pie and pumpkin and all kinds of cozy sense so I want to buy a candle and maybe I'll check out a bookstore there too. Do I need a new book? No but do I want a new book? Yes.

I'm at Bath & Body Works and I might treat myself to a candle. I want this kind of scent but in handle form. Let's see if I can find it. These are so cute, a stranger things collab. I need to sniff all the candles and see which one I want to buy. I really wanted to get a false scent and candle at Bath & Body Works but I asked the worker and he told me that they were completely sold out and nothing else really stuck out to me so I left Bath & Body Works and tried really hard to find a bookstore in the mall but I couldn't find any which was surprising because it's such a huge place. Anyways I decided to change locations and now I'm at Gwangnam Station and I am visiting Aladin which is one of my favorite used bookstores. I love shopping for books so I'm going to check out their selection and maybe buy myself a new used book.

It was really nice resting at home for a bit but I am venturing back out to meet my friend so I was torn between going to a board game cafe karaoke or an arcade because all of those sounded really fun but we decided on a board game cafe because it sounds like a nice cozy rainy day activity and it's also something I haven't done in ages. Such a big selection. Here's hmm there's a purr I like it all right well done no 10 wait okay yes this definitely has to work I love board games but I think this is theho's personal hell I am so stressed I thought rummacube was like a quick easy game for beginners but we are pretty deep into this game this game took us two hours but I don't even want theho's just happy this game is over I'm so over it all right good game good game so we just got home from the board game cafe and since it is still rainy outside we decided to order some june and we have some makgeolli we got the babamba makgeolli so chestnut flavor is my favorite so we're going to just enjoy the food and drinks and we're going to watch a thriller you wanted to watch a horror movie yes oh my god I'm such a fan I'm such a fan of all horror movies but it's a kind of like it's always fun to watch it with someone true and then I have galley that's true we both like these kinds of movies so it's perfect yes yes so this one is called blink twice and shanning tatum is the lead actor it really blew up in the u.s but I haven't had the chance to watch it yet so I think we're going to watch that and that's the end of my perfect day a lot of things did not go as expected today but still I think I remained positive and you won the game I won longest movie cube game so yeah it was definitely yeah a lot of unexpected things happened but I had a great day and I hope you guys enjoyed spending the day with me please make sure to like the video comment below some make sure to subscribe to our channel like the video and comment below what you would do on your perfect day also we will have a lot more content like this coming your way so please stay tuned and check out the pinned comment below and I will see you next time good night everybody bye

title: can / could / be able to
examples: It makes me feel very nostalgic so I'm excited to go eat some pancakes. I'm out of breath because I ran to catch this bus. I did not want to get stuck in the rain. Luckily the driver was so sweet and waited for me to catch up. Thank you. I made it to the pancake house. It really makes me think of home. Look at how many different kinds of pancakes they have. Crazy. I love that you can get your eggs cooked in many different ways here. It's so specific. I personally usually like over easy eggs. Can I get the ever popular jaw? Can I have just a little bit of cheese? True to American diner style. They serve bottomless coffee. I love it. I take my coffee black because I like it a little bit bitter. It's perfect on a rainy day. The ever popular Joe is my go-to meal at this restaurant. I love it because there are savory eggs and sweet pancakes so you get the best of both worlds. It's funny because even the portion sizes here remind me of home. They give you so much food. I also love that they give you so many condiments. They have maple syrup, hot sauce, ketchup, any kind of condiment or sauce that you would need. Let's try the pancakes first. I prefer classic pancakes with lots of maple syrup. The pancakes are so fluffy. I like a little bit of Tabasco sauce on my eggs.

I'm at Bath & Body Works and I might treat myself to a candle. I want this kind of scent but in handle form. Let's see if I can find it. These are so cute, a stranger things collab. I need to sniff all the candles and see which one I want to buy. I really wanted to get a false scent and candle at Bath & Body Works but I asked the worker and he told me that they were completely sold out and nothing else really stuck out to me so I left Bath & Body Works and tried really hard to find a bookstore in the mall but I couldn't find any which was surprising because it's such a huge place. Anyways I decided to change locations and now I'm at Gwangnam Station and I am visiting Aladin which is one of my favorite used bookstores. I love shopping for books so I'm going to check out their selection and maybe buy myself a new used book.

Luckily the driver was so sweet and waited for me to catch up. Thank you. I made it to the pancake house. It really makes me think of home. Look at how many different kinds of pancakes they have. Crazy. I love that you can get your eggs cooked in many different ways here. It's so specific. I personally usually like over easy eggs. Can I get the ever popular jaw? Can I have just a little bit of cheese? True to American diner style. They serve bottomless coffee. I love it. I take my coffee black because I like it a little bit bitter. It's perfect on a rainy day. The ever popular Joe is my go-to meal at this restaurant. I love it because there are savory eggs and sweet pancakes so you get the best of both worlds. It's funny because even the portion sizes here remind me of home. They give you so much food. I also love that they give you so many condiments. They have maple syrup, hot sauce, ketchup, any kind of condiment or sauce that you would need. Let's try the pancakes first. I prefer classic pancakes with lots of maple syrup. The pancakes are so fluffy. I like a little bit of Tabasco sauce on my eggs.

I'm at Bath & Body Works and I might treat myself to a candle. I want this kind of scent but in handle form. Let's see if I can find it. These are so cute, a stranger things collab. I need to sniff all the candles and see which one I want to buy. I really wanted to get a false scent and candle at Bath & Body Works but I asked the worker and he told me that they were completely sold out and nothing else really stuck out to me so I left Bath & Body Works and tried really hard to find a bookstore in the mall but I couldn't find any which was surprising because it's such a huge place. Anyways I decided to change locations and now I'm at Gwangnam Station and I am visiting Aladin which is one of my favorite used bookstores. I love shopping for books so I'm going to check out their selection and maybe buy myself a new used book.
